title: Seed Delight
description: Seed Delight is an add-on mod for Farmer's Delight. Mainly add some new foods.
body:
The Seeds Delight is now on modern minecraft verisons and neoforge/forge/fabric loaders.

📖 Introduction

Seed Delight is an add-on mod for Farmer's Delight. Mainly add some new foods.

It's recommended to play with JEI and Appleskin to view recipes and food stats in-game.

📦 New Additions

New Foods:

20+ food including:

Acorn, Pinecone, Sunflower Seed, Rosehip, Cherry and their cuisine.

📖 Permissions

You can use this mod in modpack or video, but please link leads to this page.
